items.title: Cloudflare Processes 10M+ Daily Insights with New Security Overview Dashboard
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Processes 10M+ Daily Insights with New Security Overview Dashboard. Cloudflare has launched a Security Overview dashboard that consolidates security signals into prioritized action items.

items.title: Presentation: The Human Scalability Problem: Why Your Teams Don’t Scale Like Your Code
items.summaryShort: Presentation: The Human Scalability Problem: Why Your Teams Don’t Scale Like Your Code. Charlotte de Jong Schouwenburg discusses the "human bottlenecks" of hyper-growth.

items.title: Article: From Batch to Micro-Batch Streaming: Lessons Learned the Hard Way in a Delta Index Pipeline
items.summaryShort: Article: From Batch to Micro-Batch Streaming: Lessons Learned the Hard Way in a Delta Index Pipeline. This article describes how a production delta-index pipeline migrated from scheduled batch to micro-batch Spark Structured Streaming.

items.title: Podcast: Roq: Leveraging Quarkus to Build Static Sites at the Speed of Go
items.summaryShort: Podcast: Roq: Leveraging Quarkus to Build Static Sites at the Speed of Go. Andy Damevin, a developer who worked on Quarkus for almost a decade, talks about Roq.

items.title: DoorDash Used Copilot to Convert Its XCTest-Based iOS Test Suite to Swift Testing
items.summaryShort: DoorDash Used Copilot to Convert Its XCTest-Based iOS Test Suite to Swift Testing. Using Copilot along with strong reliability safeguards, DoorDash migrated their iOS XCTest-based test suite to Swift Testing, thus modernizing a large test s

items.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
items.summaryShort: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO. Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

items.title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
items.summaryShort: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux. U.S.

items.title: OpenAI's cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
items.summaryShort: OpenAI's cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO. AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more.
